data.title: Ezhou Court successfully concluded two virtual currency network fraud cases involving a total amount of 460 million yuan
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official account of the Ezhou Intermediate People's Court, the Ezhou Court has recently successfully concluded two virtual currency network fraud cases. A fraud gang consisting of 34 defendants carefully planned and implemented fraud with the help of a new virtual currency trading platform. Nearly 30,000 people were defrauded in just one year, and the amount involved was 460 million yuan.
It is reported that the fraud gang set up the "OURBIT Digital Currency Trading Platform" (Obit Platform), claimed to be "registered in Singapore" and other gimmicks, forged trading K-line charts based on the Bitcoin market trading price, and fabricated 9 types of virtual currency trading illusions. After trial, the court determined that the amount involved was extremely huge, and the defendants' actions constituted fraud. According to the law, 34 defendants were sentenced to fixed-term imprisonment ranging from three to twelve years and fined. In view of the large number of people involved and the complexity of the case, the court tried the case separately, and the judgments have now come into effect.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a Narrowed 0.62% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 28, 2025, 04:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.530029 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.62% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 102 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 102 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 99.2343 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 2.406 million US dollars.

data.title: Gate.io HODLer Airdrop Launches Numine(NUMI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch Numine (NUMI) spot trading at 20:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, and will start the HODLer Airdrop from 16:00 on March 29 to 16:00 on March 31 (UTC+8). Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 1,000,000 NUMI tokens. The upper limit for individual participation is 5,000 GT.

data.title: Bitget launches the second Early Hunter Airdrop, this airdrop project is Tutorial (TUT)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget launched the second Early Hunter Airdrop, this airdrop project is Tutorial (TUT). Users only need to hold at least 10 BGB in Bitget spot, leverage and financial accounts to participate in the Early Hunter airdrop plan. The airdrop plan is as follows:
Sunshine Award:
The first 1,000 users who complete TUT spot transactions before 02:00 (UTC+8) on March 28 will receive a TUT token airdrop equivalent to US$10. The price of TUT awards will be based on the closing price of the day before the award.
Surprise Grand Prize:
Users who complete TUT spot transactions before 18:00 (UTC+8) on March 31 and hold at least 10 BGB will automatically enter the lottery pool. Bitget will conduct a live lottery on the Bitget official X platform at 22:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, with the first prize being 1,000 BGB and the second prize being 100 BGB.
Bitget Early Hunter Airdrop aims to reward early traders of high-quality projects, and will cooperate with high-potential projects from time to time to issue token airdrop rewards.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Outflows
data.description:
According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on March 27 (Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $4.2159 million. All nine ETFs reported no net inflows. Notably, the VanEck ETF (ETHV) experienced a single-day net outflow of $2.207 million, with a historical total net inflow of $136 million. Meanwhile, the Fidelity ETF (FETH) recorded a single-day net outflow of $2.0088 million, with a historical total net inflow of $1.408 billion.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $6.871 billion, representing 2.84% of Ethereum's total market capitalization. The historical cumulative net inflow for these ETFs is $2.404 billion.

data.title: CZ responds to Abu Dhabi MGX's $2 billion investment in Binance: No gambling clauses and strategic considerations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CZ responded to the "Abu Dhabi MGX $2 billion investment in Binance" on the X platform and said, "There is no gambling clause and no strategy (at least from my personal perspective)."

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $4.2159 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 27, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 4.2159 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was VanEck ETF ETHV, with a single-day net outflow of 2.207 million US dollars. Currently, ETHV has a total net inflow of 136 million US dollars.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 2.0088 million US dollars. Currently, FETH has a total net inflow of 1.408 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 6.871 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.84%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.404 billion US dollars.
